title: Cotton Floor Mops Mop System with Super Absorbent Cotton Head, 110cm Metal Handle and Extra Head Refill Effective Cleaning For Home, Office and Commercial Use
features: Super Absorbent Floor Mop − When it comes to cleaning and keeping your floors dry, our cotton mops do a great job! A cotton mop head is a great option because of its absorbent properties, excellent scrubbing power, and efficiency in doing quick work for any spills. Each purchase of our mop system comes with an additional cotton mop head replacement and can be used within the home, office, or as a commercial mop as well.

Easy to Use Traditional Mop − Our cleaning mops for floors come with a long, lightweight, metal mop stick, eliminating the need for you to bend down when cleaning floors. This does not only make it convenient for anyone using it but more importantly, for those with back problems. The cotton string mop head glides smoothly on any flat floor surface, while its sturdy handle provides excellent support and control. The mop heads screw in are easy to assemble and replace.

Use Anywhere − Our hard floor mop was designed with versatility in mind. The 120cm mop handle is long enough, allowing you to adjust your grip and angle when cleaning hard-to-reach places while the super absorbent cotton mop head sucks in water effectively. You can use it as floor mops for laminate floors, mop for wooden floors, bath mop, kitchen mop, or keep it in the garage to wipe away oil and grease off your concrete floor.

Top Quality Product − Our cotton mop was built to be tough and take a beating. Its metal handle is thick enough to not easily dent and crack, while its cotton mop head is made from high-quality cotton and won't easily fall apart compared to lower quality cotton mops for floors. You use our heavy duty mop for a long time without having any problem. For the quality and price, this floor cleaning mop set is the deal available in the market!

Value For Money – Supplied by The Dustpan and Brush Store with the end-user in mind. We made sure that our floor cleaning mops are not only of great quality but reasonably priced as well. All the perks of a domestic, commercial, and industrial mop without the hefty price tag!
description: Product Description TDBS Cotton Floor Mop with Spare Replacement Mop Head - Home Cleaning A cotton mop head is a great option because of its absorbent properties, excellent scrubbing power, and efficiency in doing quick work for any spills. The Indoor Cleaning Range Cotton Floor Mop Add To Basket Mop and Bucket Set Buying Options Indoor Broom Add To Basket Long Handled Dustpan Add To Basket Dish Brushes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 7,061 4.2 out of 5 stars 217 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,060 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,174 4.6 out of 5 stars 289 Price £8.47 £ 8 . 47 — £8.47 £ 8 . 47 £11.04 £ 11 . 04 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Cleaning Must Have ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Type Cotton Floor Mop Mop and Bucket Set Indoor Broom Long Handled Dustpan and Brush Dish Brushes Uses Kitchen, floors, bathroom etc Kitchen, floors, bathroom etc Living room, Kitchen, Bedroom Floor Cleaning Washing Up Brushes Pack Includes 2 Mop Heads and Handle Mop and bucket Broom head and handle 1 Set 5 Brushes High Quality ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multi Purpose Cotton Floor Cleaning Mop - Comes with 2 Mop Heads You can use it as floor mop for laminate floors, mop for wooden floor mop, bath mop, shower mop, kitchen mop, or keep it in the garage to wipe away oil and grease off your concrete floor. Previous page For Absorbing Liquids Highly Absorbent Crafted from high-quality, pure cotton, this floor mop delivers excellent absorbency. 2 Mop Heads For Multiple Uses 2 Mop heads included! Perfect for multiple uses Easy Spills Removal Cleaning Spills The microfibre mop is soft yet durable, making it perfect for both delicate floors. Easy to Assemble Durable Handle The mop handle is ergonomically designed for comfortable use. Next page 1 Highly Absorbent 2 2 Mop Heads 3 Cleaning Spills 4 Durable Handle Versatile Cotton Floor Mop Perfect for Indoor Cleaning This floor mop and heavy duty mop bucket is versatile, suitable for various floor types, including tiles, laminate, and hardwood. Where is the cotton floor mop best used? The TDBS Cotton floor mop is ideal for cleaning indoor areas such as the kitchen, bathroom, living room, bedroom, and other similar spaces. How long is the handle of the mop? The mop features a 4-piece handle that can be assembled to reach up to 120cm, providing a comfortable length for easy cleaning. Does the package include 2 mop heads? Yes, the package includes 2 cotton mop heads, perfect for multiple cleaning uses. What is the material of the mop head? The mop head is made from pure cotton material, which is highly absorbent and suitable for thorough cleaning. Is it easy to assemble? Yes, it is very easy to assemble with its twist-and-lock feature for all handle pieces.
